fields.title: Check If Target Is Immersed In Water
fields.description: Whether or not the target should be fully immersed in water for the knockback rules to apply.
Filter for the entity type that will be affected by these knockback rules.

fields.title: Domain
fields.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

fields.title: Subject
fields.description: The subject of this filter test.

fields.title: Test
fields.description: The name of the test to apply.

fields.title: Value
fields.description: The value being compared with the test.

fields.title: Horizontal Hit Angle Scale
fields.description: Scaling factor to angle the knockback horizontally based on the attacker's aim direction.

fields.title: Horizontal Power
fields.description: Power with which a target should be knocked backwards.

fields.title: Scale Previous Velocity
fields.description: Scaling factor to apply to the target's velocity before applying knockback.

fields.title: Scale With Damage
fields.description: Scaling factor to the magnitude of knockback based on the inverse square of the damage.

fields.title: Vertical Hit Angle Scale
fields.description: Scaling factor to angle the knockback vertically based on the attacker's aim direction.

fields.title: Vertical Position Angle Scale
fields.description: Scaling factor to angle the knockback vertically based on the difference in the attacker's feet position to the target's feet position.

fields.title: Vertical Power
fields.description: Power with which a target should be knocked upwards.

fields.title: Vertical Velocity Cap
fields.description: Maximum allowed Y velocity after target's knockback rules have been evaluated.
